description: Identification and characteristics of forage legumes and grasses; management and culture of legumes, grasses and grass- legume mixtures; weed, insect, and forage disease control; hay and haymaking; legume, grass, and corn silage; forage varieties and their uses; forage quality and its importance in feeding livestock; pasture types and improvement; forage production trends.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Foundations of Farm Management certificate program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Foundations of Farm Management certificate program
